authority.department: Labour Department, Government of West Bengal

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in West Bengal.

rules.title: Review West Bengal Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the West Bengal Shops and Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: West Bengal Shops and Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, wage registers, attendance registers and prescribed notices under West Bengal labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under West Bengal labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with West Bengal provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave, holidays and weekly offs.

citations.reference: West Bengal Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, deduction, return filing and payment obligations apply under West Bengal law.

citations.reference: West Bengal State Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments Act, 1979

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the West Bengal Labour Welfare Fund including employer and employee contributions where applicable.

citations.reference: West Bengal Labour Welfare Fund Act

rules.title: Review West Bengal Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest West Bengal minimum wage notifications applicable to the scheduled employment.

citations.reference: Government of West Bengal Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor West Bengal Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of West Bengal.

citations.reference: Government of West Bengal Labour Notifications

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, Professional Tax, Labour Welfare Fund, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for Professional Tax returns, Labour Welfare Fund contributions, statutory filings, inspections and licence renewals.
